title: My Week Question - How do I make my tasks appear?
excerpt: I’ve set a deadline but it doesn’t appear in My Week?

posts.author: premso (Premila Thurairatnam)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve set a deadline but it doesn’t appear in My Week?

posts.author: naomiCSM (Naomi SInger)
posts.cookedHtml:
@premso @melzc
Naomi from the monday.com team here. Were you assigned to this item? You must be assigned, or following the assignee and have the deadline mode in the settings of My Week set. See the screenshot below for the correct settings, and refer to this article for more help.

image1544×914 104 KB

You will notice we will be making improvements to My Week ( will be My work) so stay tuned for that!
